query:
INSERT INTO resource_group (
                id, created_date_time, modification_date_time, resource_group_name, attributes, targets
            )
            VALUES (
                gen_random_uuid()::text, now(), now(), $1, $2, $3)
            RETURNING
                id,
                created_date_time,
                modification_date_time,
                resource_group_name,
                attributes,
                targets as "targets:Vec<Target>"
